cases.input: We have a multi-tenant SaaS OLTP workload currently at 800GB growing to 3TB in 2 years. Peak read TPS is 5x write TPS. RTO is 30 minutes, RPO is 5 minutes. Which Azure SQL tier should we use?
cases.context: Net-new workload, variable load patterns, cost matters but reliability is primary

cases.input: We have an audit log table growing by 50 million rows per month. Queries always filter by date range. Older data is rarely accessed but must be retained for 7 years. How should we partition this?
cases.context: Azure SQL Database, General Purpose tier, compliance retention requirements

cases.input: We store customer SSN, email, and free-text medical notes in Azure SQL. We need to search by email equality, but SSN is never searched. Medical notes need range queries. How should we encrypt these columns?
We have a production Azure SQL Database with performance regressions after recent index changes. Query Store is not enabled. How should we configure Query Store and diagnose the regression?
cases.context: Business Critical tier, production database, regression happened last week

cases.input: Our Azure SQL Database needs cross-region disaster recovery. We need the app to automatically switch to the secondary region on failure. How should we configure failover groups and what are the caveats?
cases.context: Production workload, East US primary, West US secondary, auto-failover desired
